name: codex-log-viewer
description: Local-first parser and analytics dashboard for OpenAI Codex session logs.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @codex-log-viewer/parser && npm run build -w @codex-log-viewer/analytics && npm run build -w @codex-log-viewer/server && npm run build -w @codex-log-viewer/cli && npm run build -w @codex-log-viewer/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w @codex-log-viewer/parser && npm run test -w @codex-log-viewer/analytics
scripts.test:all: npm test && npm run lint && npm run test:e2e
scripts.serve: npm run build && npm run start -w @codex-log-viewer/server
scripts.cli: npm run build -w @codex-log-viewer/parser && npm run build -w @codex-log-viewer/analytics && npm run build -w @codex-log-viewer/server && npm run build -w @codex-log-viewer/cli && node apps/cli/dist/index.js
